raw_consumer_statement: I set up a fraud claim for 3 charges XX/XX/year> {$3500.00} XX/XX/year> {$590.00} XX/XX/year> {$4300.00} = {$8500.00} case claim XXXX There was some confusion on my end to try to see if I made the charges, once I identified that I did not, I set up a fraud claim.
